subcodes.first_line: O God, O Thou Who art bountiful in Thy gifts, pardoning in transgressions, fulfilling in response to prayer, delivering from tribulation, and healing in sickness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اللهم یا کثیر العطاء و عافی الخطا و وافی الندآء و کافی المحن و شافی السقم انی
subcodes.subjects: @mystical themes, @power of prayer, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @service to others; to the Cause of God
